fields.label: Latitude
fields.description: Optional center-point latitude for this acquisition

fields.label: Longitude
fields.description: Optional center-point longitude for this acquisition

fields.label: Title Deed Number
fields.description: Title deed for this specific land acquisition.

fields.label: Land Sellers
fields.description: Legacy table hidden after the move to Purchase Order and Purchase Invoice driven seller tracking.

fields.label: Primary Land Seller (Supplier)
fields.description: Must exist as a Supplier in ERPNext — used as the supplier on the base land Purchase Invoice created on approval

fields.label: Other Service Posted Total (TZS)
fields.description: Total posted through non-land-seller Purchase Invoices tagged to this Land Acquisition. Purchase Orders show in the table as commitments but are not included in this total.

fields.label: Base Seller Cost (TZS)
fields.description: Calculated automatically from submitted Purchase Invoices tagged to this Land Acquisition where the Supplier is marked as a Land Seller.

fields.label: Committed Extra Costs (TZS)
fields.description: Planned extra costs from open Purchase Orders tagged to this Land Acquisition. These are commitments, not yet posted costs.

fields.label: Other Service Posted Costs (TZS)
fields.description: Submitted non-land-seller Purchase Invoices tagged to this Land Acquisition. These are part of the total land cost.

fields.label: Total Land Cost (TZS)
fields.description: Total submitted Purchase Invoices tagged to this Land Acquisition. This is the current land cost basis used downstream.

fields.label: Land Cost per sqm (TZS)
fields.description: Auto-calculated from Total Land Cost divided by Total Area. Plot Master uses this internally for allocation, but the detail now lives here.

fields.label: Cost Breakdown
fields.description: Legacy manual table. Standard ERP transactions tagged to this Land Acquisition are now the primary cost source.

fields.label: Total Acquisition Cost
fields.description: Legacy compatibility field.

fields.label: Exchange Rate
fields.description: Managed automatically for the summary view.

fields.label: Booking Fee %
fields.description: Default booking fee percentage for plots created under this acquisition

fields.label: Government Share %
fields.description: Default government share percentage for plots created under this acquisition

fields.label: Default Selling Price per sqm (TZS)
fields.description: Legacy single-rate field kept only for compatibility during the per-plot-type pricing cutover.

fields.label: Payment Completion Days
fields.description: Default number of days allowed to complete plot payment after the fee stage

fields.label: Residential Rate per sqm (TZS)
fields.description: Selling rate per sqm to apply automatically on Residential plots created under this acquisition.

fields.label: Commercial Rate per sqm (TZS)
fields.description: Selling rate per sqm to apply automatically on Commercial plots created under this acquisition.

fields.label: Mixed-Use Rate per sqm (TZS)
fields.description: Selling rate per sqm to apply automatically on Mixed-Use plots created under this acquisition.

fields.label: Total Plots Created
fields.description: Number of plots subdivided from this acquisition

fields.label: Available Plots
fields.description: Plots not yet contracted or sold

fields.label: Reserved Plots
fields.description: Plots currently locked for a customer or under active contract

fields.label: Delivered / Closed Plots
fields.description: Plots that have been delivered or title closed
